introSection: Gira Chocomonstros is steel semi-spinning hamster wheel kiddie roller coaster located at Cacau Show Megastore Itapevi in Cacau Show Megastore Itapevi.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: There are four regular spinning cars which seat two riders in two rows facing back-to-back. The front and second car are "Hamster Wheel" cars which seats two riders facing each-other. As the train moves, this car "rolls", inverting its riders multiple times.

fullText:
Gira Chocomonstros is steel semi-spinning hamster wheel kiddie roller coaster located at Cacau Show Megastore Itapevi in Cacau Show Megastore Itapevi.

Oval layout.

Mint track and black supports.

There are four regular spinning cars which seat two riders in two rows facing back-to-back. The front and second car are "Hamster Wheel" cars which seats two riders facing each-other. As the train moves, this car "rolls", inverting its riders multiple times.
